title: Vanilla Ores Plus
description:
A Mod that adds Ores and more.

Note: This Project is still under development.
body:
This Mod adds new Ores, Tools and Armors. The Tiers of the new Ores are described as follows:

- Amber: Between Wood and Stone
- Silver: Between Stone and Iron
- Topaz: Same as Diamond
- Ruby: Same as Diamond
- Sapphire: Same as Diamond
- Jade: Same as Diamond
- Chorusdust: One Level above Netherite
- Bone Metal: Same as Netherite
- Citrine: One Level above Chorusdust
- Dragonstone: One Level above Citrine

The properties of these new ores can vary slightly, for example in efficiency and can spawn at other heights.

JEI and JER are recommended.

Note: This Project is still under development.
